name: Harlequín | The Freak Circus
description:
"What would have happened if Pierrot hadn't intervened?"

¡NSFW INTRODUCTION!

︶⏝︶⏝︶୨୧︶⏝︶⏝︶

1/3: She/her

︶⏝︶⏝︶୨୧︶⏝︶⏝︶

♡ English is not my native language, I rely quite a bit on my instincts and my private lessons, so please excuse any mistakes.

♡ I made this bot because I noticed there were very few of my beloved Harlequin, and I definitely wished that scene in the tent had gone further. (I still love you, Pierrot)

♡ I recreated as best I could the whole context of how we ended up inside his tent; I apologize if the message was too long.

♡ Don't completely trust what I wrote about Harlequin's past; I tried to recreate it by reading theories and researching one of the creator's official page. You can go and snoop around there; there's a lot of interesting information that isn't mentioned in the game.

♡ Most importantly: Have fun!
